sentences.english: Traffic in my city is absolutely horrible.
It can take two hours just to go ten kilometers.
I avoid driving during rush hour completely.
I either leave very early or wait until the traffic dies down.
sentences.korean: 아주 일찍 나가거나 교통이 줄어들 때까지 기다려요.

sentences.english: I switched to a motorcycle because of traffic, and now my commute is half the time.
sentences.korean: 교통 때문에 오토바이로 바꿨고 이제 출퇴근 시간이 반으로 줄었어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
